storyBeat: 四歲孔融 + 七兄弟 — 父親拿一盤梨回來

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 boy = 男孩
🔑 young = 年輕的
🔑 pear = 梨
🔑 plate = 盤子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, there lived a boy named Kong Rong.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,在中國,有一個小男孩,名字叫孔融。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was four years old and the youngest of seven brothers.
questions.question: How many brothers did Kong Rong have at home?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: youngest of seven → 還有六個哥哥 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The house was warm and the brothers waited at the table.
questions.questionEn: Was this a calm and warm family moment?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 屋裡溫暖 + 兄弟等著 → 平靜溫暖 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One evening, their father came home with a plate of pears.
questions.explanationZh: 一天傍晚,父親帶了一盤梨子回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The plate had big pears and small pears on it.
questions.question: What was on the plate?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: big pears and small pears → 不同大小的梨子 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All the brothers came near to look at the plate.
questions.explanationZh: 所有兄弟都靠過來看那盤梨子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their eyes went straight to the biggest pear of all.
questions.question: What did the brothers look at first?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: eyes to biggest → 其中一個最大的梨子 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But no one reached out to take a pear yet.
questions.explanationZh: 但還沒有人伸手拿梨子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the room feel before anyone picked a pear?
questions.question: How did the room feel?
questions.explanationZh: 溫暖家庭 + 等待 → 好奇又安靜 (anticipation)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Seven boys. One plate of pears. Who would pick first...
questions.explanationZh: 七個男孩,一盤梨子。誰會先選呢……

storyBeat: 父親說:「你先選一個」 — 大家看著孔融

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 table = 桌子
🔑 kind = 親切
🔑 smile = 微笑
🔑 pick = 選
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father put the plate down on the family table.
questions.explanationZh: 父親把盤子放到家裡的桌上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at little Kong Rong and gave a kind smile.
questions.question: How did the father look at Kong Rong?
options: in a soft and kind way
questions.explanationZh: 推理: kind smile → 溫柔親切 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father turned to the smallest child before the others.
questions.questionEn: Did the father want the youngest to choose first?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 轉向最小的 + 在其他人之前 → 想讓最小的先選 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "You are the youngest. You may pick first," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 「你最小,你可以先選,」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told Kong Rong he could choose any pear he liked.
questions.question: What did the father tell Kong Rong?
options: any one of the pears was his choice
questions.explanationZh: 推理: choose any pear → 哪一顆都可以選 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All six brothers turned their heads to watch.
questions.explanationZh: 六個哥哥都轉頭看著他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Twelve eyes were now on little Kong Rong.
questions.question: Who was watching Kong Rong now?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: twelve eyes → 六個哥哥 (12 ÷ 2 = 6) → 所有哥哥 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one spoke. The room waited for him to move.
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人說話。房間等著他動作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How would a four-year-old feel with all eyes on him?
questions.question: How would Kong Rong feel?
questions.explanationZh: 所有人看著 + 房間等待 → 害羞但在思考 (spotlight)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Big pears and small pears were waiting on the plate...
questions.explanationZh: 盤子上,大梨和小梨都在等著……

storyBeat: 大梨小梨並排 — 該選哪個?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 big = 大的
🔑 small = 小的
🔑 sweet = 甜
🔑 thin = 瘦
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Big pears and small pears sat side by side.
questions.explanationZh: 大梨和小梨並排放著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One pear was the biggest of all. It looked very sweet.
questions.question: What was special about the biggest pear?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: looked very sweet → 好吃的樣子 (paraphrase, 不抄原句)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One pear was the smallest. It looked a bit thin.
questions.questionEn: Did the smallest pear look as nice as the biggest?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 最小的看起來瘦 + 對比最甜的 → 沒那麼好 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong looked at the pears for a long moment.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融看著梨子,看了好久。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His small face was quiet but his eyes were full of thought.
questions.question: What was Kong Rong doing while he looked?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 眼裡充滿思考 → 仔細思考 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A four-year-old usually picks the biggest and sweetest.
questions.explanationZh: 四歲的小孩通常會選最大最甜的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The brothers waited to see Kong Rong grab the big one.
questions.question: What did the brothers expect to see?
options: a hand going to the biggest pear
a quick walk out of the room
a long song at the table
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 哥哥們等著看他拿大的 → 手伸向最大的梨 (paraphrase, 預期)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Kong Rong did not move fast like other small kids.
questions.explanationZh: 但孔融沒有像其他小孩那樣動得快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of moment was this for Kong Rong?
questions.question: What kind of moment?
questions.explanationZh: 不像別的小孩那樣快 → 困難但安靜的選擇 (moral 兩難)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then his small hand began to move toward the plate...
questions.explanationZh: 然後,他的小手開始伸向盤子……

storyBeat: 孔融伸手選了最小的 — 父親問:「為什麼?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 reach = 伸手
🔑 hand = 手
🔑 take = 拿
🔑 why = 為什麼
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out with his small hand.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融伸出他的小手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not take the biggest pear.
questions.question: Did Kong Rong grab the biggest pear?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: did not take biggest → 沒拿,跳過 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His brothers raised their eyebrows in soft surprise.
questions.questionEn: Did the brothers expect this choice?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 揚眉 + 驚訝 → 沒料到 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked up the smallest pear from the plate.
questions.explanationZh: 他從盤子上拿起最小的梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The thin little pear sat lightly in his small hand.
questions.question: Which pear did Kong Rong end up with?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: thin little pear → 比較小的其中一個 (paraphrase, 不抄原句)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father leaned forward with gentle eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 父親身體微微前傾,眼神溫柔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Why this one, my son?" his father asked softly.
questions.question: What did the father want to know?
options: where the mother was right now
his son's reason for the small pear
questions.explanationZh: 推理: why this one → 兒子為什麼選小梨 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The room was quiet. Everyone waited for the small boy.
questions.explanationZh: 房間很安靜。大家都等著小男孩開口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did everyone want to hear from Kong Rong?
questions.question: What did they want to hear?
questions.explanationZh: 安靜等小男孩 → 等他的理由 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong took a small breath and began to speak...
questions.explanationZh: 孔融輕輕吸了一口氣,開始說話……

storyBeat: 孔融說:「我年紀小,應該吃小的」 — 父親微笑

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 hold = 握
🔑 family = 家人
🔑 should = 應該
🔑 warm = 溫暖的
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong held the small pear in his hands.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融把小梨握在手裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His voice was small but very clear in the room.
questions.question: How did Kong Rong speak?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: small but clear → 安靜但聽得清楚 (paraphrase, 不抄原句)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His face was calm. He did not look afraid at all.
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong nervous to share his reason?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 平靜 + 不害怕 → 不緊張 → 答 No

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I am the youngest in our family," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我是家裡最小的,」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I should take the small one, not the big one."
questions.question: What did Kong Rong say he should take?
options: the small pear, not the big one
questions.explanationZh: 推理: small one, not the big → 小的,不是大的 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father smiled a warm smile back at him.
questions.explanationZh: 父親回給他一個溫暖的微笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Something warm moved inside his father's chest.
questions.question: How did the father feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: warm moved inside chest → 溫暖感動 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his father wanted to hear one more thing.
questions.explanationZh: 但父親還想聽一件事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the father feel about his small son?
questions.question: How did the father feel?
questions.explanationZh: 溫暖微笑 + 心裡感動 → 驕傲又感動 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father leaned closer. "And one more question, son..."
questions.explanationZh: 父親靠近一點。「再問你一個問題,兒子……」

storyBeat: 父親問:「那你哥哥呢?」 — 孔融再答一層

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 soft = 輕柔的
🔑 voice = 聲音
🔑 older = 較大的
🔑 think = 想
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father asked again with a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 父親再次用輕柔的聲音問。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His voice was gentle, like he was teaching a lesson.
questions.question: How did the father ask the next question?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: gentle like teaching → 溫柔像老師 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father wanted to know if his son had thought even more.
questions.questionEn: Was the father testing how deep Kong Rong's thinking went?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 想知道有沒有想更深 → 在測思考深度 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "And what about your six older brothers?"
questions.explanationZh: 「那你六個哥哥呢?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father wanted to know what Kong Rong thought about them.
questions.question: What did the father ask about now?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: about your brothers → 哥哥們 (paraphrase, 不能直接 copy)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong thought for a moment and looked up.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融想了一下,抬起頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not need much time to find the words.
questions.question: How long did Kong Rong need to think?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 不需要太多時間 → 不太久 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He gave a simple and clear answer.
questions.explanationZh: 他給了一個簡單清楚的答案。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of answer was Kong Rong about to give?
questions.question: What kind of answer?
questions.explanationZh: 簡單清楚 + 父親教學 → 簡單但有智慧 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole family leaned in to hear what he would say...
questions.explanationZh: 全家人靠過來,想聽他要說什麼……

storyBeat: 「哥哥比我大,應該吃大的」 — 全家學到一課

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 bigger = 更大
🔑 than = 比
🔑 happy = 開心的
🔑 learn = 學
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My brothers are bigger than me," Kong Rong said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我哥哥比我大,」孔融說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pointed at himself and then at his older brothers.
questions.question: What did Kong Rong compare?
options: the size of bodies in the family
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 指自己再指哥哥 → 家裡人的身材大小 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His logic was simple. Bigger bodies need bigger pears.
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong's reason easy for a child to understand?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: simple logic + child-friendly → 容易懂 → 答 Yes

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "They should take the big pears, not me."
questions.explanationZh: 「他們應該拿大的梨,不是我。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The small boy gave the big pears to his older brothers.
questions.question: What was Kong Rong saying in two lines together?
options: big ones for the older, small one for me
all the pears are mine alone
no one should eat any pears
pears are only for the parents
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 兩句合起來 → 大的給哥哥,小的留我 (paraphrase, 完整論點)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father was so happy he could not speak.
questions.explanationZh: 父親開心到說不出話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes were bright. He put a hand on Kong Rong's head.
questions.question: How did the father show his feeling?
options: with bright eyes and a soft touch
questions.explanationZh: 推理: bright eyes + hand on head → 眼睛發亮 + 輕拍 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night the family learned a small but big lesson.
questions.explanationZh: 那晚,全家學到一個小小但很大的功課。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the family learn that night?
questions.question: What did they learn?
questions.explanationZh: 孔融讓梨 → 分享 / 體貼家人 (paraphrase, theme)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long after that night, the story was told again and again...
questions.explanationZh: 那晚之後很久,這個故事還是一遍又一遍地被傳下去……
